highlights: Built web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and jQuery.
Developed logistics integration software connecting import-export businesses with the Thai Customs NSW platform.
Created custom reports using FastReport based on Thai Customs platform data and user requirements.
Developed and maintained both Windows applications and Web applications.
Developed and optimized scalable software solutions.
Built gamification systems using Multi-Tier Architecture.
Implemented Ecommerce application on android and iOS platforms integrate with gamification features.
Stabilized Photon PUN2 P2P multiplayer systems for X Battle Cars PVP, improving disconnect, reconnect, and room-state synchronization behavior.
Built byte serialization workflows to store and synchronize complex gameplay data through Photon Room Data despite PUN2 primitive-data limitations.
Implemented shared gameplay systems including lobby inventory setup, player car selection, territory capture, skills, buffs, debuffs, team data, and host migration support.
Developed high-volume educational games for kindergarten through high school learning content, mainly for mathematics and Thai language subjects.
Built content-loading gameplay structures so a single game format could support multiple grade levels depending on lesson design and uploaded teaching content.
Practiced requirement analysis, task planning, and workload management while delivering many Unity games across both Android and iOS platforms.
Started my professional game development career on Pandora Hunter, a Thai-inspired mobile board game built with Unity.
Implemented Unity UI screens and simple client-side features while learning frontend-to-backend communication through APIs and JSON.
Supported stage design with varied board layouts, obstacle patterns, traps, and short-session mobile gameplay pacing.
